descriptions.tokens/canvas.css: Pan/zoom canvas scaffold: --cv-x/y/scale/grid vars; .spatial-canvas/-world/-node/-ghost/-memory classes for a node-graph workspace.
descriptions.tokens/depth.css: Elevation ramp --elev-0..5 + --shadow-c/--hairline/--blur-sm..lg tokens; .e0-e5 shadow classes and .grain noise overlay.
descriptions.tokens/diagram.css: Diagram vocabulary: --dgm-stroke/node/connector/edge-kind tokens + .dgm-node/.dgm-edge--flow/dep/ref/rej/comm classes and glyphgraph growth motion.
descriptions.tokens/export.css: Print/slide page frames --page-a4-*/--slide-* + .page for on-screen authoring; .lc lifecycle badges (experimental/stable/deprecated).
descriptions.tokens/fonts.css: @font-face declarations self-hosting Sora/DM Sans/JetBrains Mono variable woff2 files (replaces a live Google Fonts @import).
descriptions.tokens/glass.css: --glass-blur/opacity/saturate/specular tokens + per-zone tint vars; .glass/.glass--raised/.glass--inset frosted-material utilities.
descriptions.tokens/icons.css: --icon-xs..xl sizes, --icon-stroke/cap/join, --icon-ink/accent; .icon and .icon-box classes for inline SVG glyphs.
descriptions.tokens/imagery.css: --ar-square..hero aspect ratios + --img-radius/bg/overlay; .media aspect-ratio box, .img-blurup loading, [data-art] art-direction crops.
descriptions.tokens/material.css: --mat-* role vars consumed by .material/.material--raised/--inset; binds glass/parchment/stone/velum/none materials + [data-ground-texture] patterns.
descriptions.tokens/provenance.css: --author-vi/human/suggested colors; [data-author] edge marker + .by/.by-vi/.by-human/.by-suggested authorship badges, .vi-authored wash.
descriptions.tokens/skins.css: SKIN system: [data-skin=glass/stone/parchment/carbon] re-bind --skin-mat-*/--edge-*/--depth-* roles for .material consumers; block states (.is-selected/.is-potential/.is-stacked), depth ladder, thread/node-hub graph painters.
descriptions.tokens/surfaces.css: --bp-mobile..wide breakpoints, --frame-desktop/tablet/mobile-p/l dimensions, --safe-*/--gutter-*; [data-surface] switching, .cq container-query, .surface-shell mobile frame.
descriptions.tokens/text.css: --len-micro..desc length budgets; .q/.alt-short authored-alternate mechanism; .t-micro/.t-label/.t-title/.t-desc/.t-body/.t-src typed-text role classes.
descriptions.tokens/texture.css: --hatch-*/--blueprint-* tokens; .hatch-band/.hatch-rule diagonal gold hatch, .blueprint grid ghost, .bullet markers, .frame-signature page signature.
descriptions.tokens/theme.css: [data-theme=dim/dark/contrast] re-bind --zone-ground/--ink ramp/--border-*/--shadow-c per mode; [data-ground=clean/warm] light sub-axis; themed scrollbars.
descriptions.colors_and_type.css: Core token source: fonts.css import + --paper/--ink/--accent-gold/--accent-bronze/--accent-communication/--status-*/--border-*/--shadow-*/--r-*/--s-*/--font-*/--weight-* + .cv-h1..h4/.cv-body/.cv-caption presets; --zone-* surface-zone registry (surface/strong/edge/ink per zone) + --vi-*/--comm-* + palette variants + .zone-* helper classes.
descriptions.styles.css: Root entry stylesheet: @imports colors_and_type.css + all tokens/*.css files + core/containers.css in dependency order; contains no rules of its own.
descriptions.tonal-zoning.css: Demo page styles consuming zone tokens: .tz-doc/.tz-mast/.tz-registry/.tz-zone zone-showcase cards, .tz-roles component demos, .cvx-btn/chip/vi sample components, .ov-* applied-dashboard mockup layout.
descriptions.core/ContainmentTree.jsx: exports ContainmentTree(props) — the block solver: recursive band/section/zone/cluster/atom layout from a CVNode tree, LOD-prunes by priority/detail, computes zone wash from nesting depth, dispatches atom rendering through a registerAtom(role,fn) registry (metric, hero-number, bullet, chip, badge, note, qr, logo, ramp-card, image, icon, text, headline), plus inline-edit (contentEditable commit-on-blur), motion stagger, TimePlayer/Disclose helpers, and skeleton loading states.
descriptions.core/DiagramSolver.jsx: exports DiagramSolver(props) — the graph solver: layout(graph) computes node positions per diagram type (hub/morph/network/pipeline/timeline/quadrant/tree/stack/glyphgraph with frozen-address placement), then renders SVG nodes+edges plus dedicated HTML views for stepper/orbital/stacked/spectrum/manifold/fidelity subtypes and a full glyphGraphView (CV_GLYPHIC-rendered nodes, CV_SHAPES edges, CV_MEANING-resolved colors/labels).
descriptions.core/RenderType.jsx: exports RenderType(props), typeToNode(type,data,axis), and CoreTypes — the bridge that resolves a CV_REGISTRY Type + data into ContainmentTree/DiagramSolver IR (blockToNode() maps ~30 block/atom Type keys, widgetToNode() maps widget docs to a Zone tile) and renders via window.__cvContainmentTree; CoreTypes exposes core archetypes as registry-shaped seeds read from archetype-catalog.js.
descriptions.core/Slide.jsx: exports Slide(props) and Archetypes — ARCHETYPES registry of ~25 pure content-to-CVNode-tree builder functions (cover, split, statement, compare, modes, triptych, metric-band, checklist, timeline, profile, terms, gallery, closing, stepper, diagram, section, plus capital-raise archetypes: product-cover/closing, photo-divider, logo-wall, team, dashboard, reasons, orbital, stacked, spectrum, manifold, fidelity); Slide component delegates to RenderType (window.__cvRenderType) with archetype+content.
descriptions.core/archetype-catalog.js: single-source catalogue: META (name/icon/desc per archetype key) + SAMPLES (representative ConceptV content per key) combined into window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG seeds array (registry Type shape) and window.CV_ARCHETYPE_META, consumed by both RenderType.jsx and the app's registry seeding.
descriptions.core/containers.css: CSS for the containment ladder (.cv-band/.cv-section/.cv-zone/.cv-cluster/.cv-atom) with depth-computed zone wash via color-mix + --zone-depth, container-query collapse rules for narrow surfaces, frosted-overlay zone variant, and the .cv-slide-frame/.cv-slide-stage paged-surface (slide/print) letterbox frame consumed by core/slide-fit.js.
descriptions.core/cv-address.js: window.CV_ADDRESS — pure address-algebra module: span(k,n,parent) partitions [0,1) spans, encode/decode paths to/from a mixed-radix number, lca/lcaAll computes lowest-common-ancestor of address paths, zones(parts,axisPx) resolves fraction arrays to pixel offsets, slotFor(index,capacity) gives frozen doubling-capacity slots.
descriptions.core/cv-arc.js: window.CV_ARC — exports plan(arcName,n,{narrative_roles,arcs}) which deterministically expands an arc's elastic role run-lengths to exactly n beats, assigns each beat an archetype (cycled from role affinity, forced-change at role boundaries) and dial values (warmth/register/density) from the role's envelope.
descriptions.core/cv-node.js: window.CV_NODE — universal node lens/resolver unifying CV_REGISTRY/CV_AXES/CV_GLYPHIC/CV_COND into one canonical node shape; exports lens(), socketsOf(), accepts(), candidates(), resolve()/render() (recursive socket-fill + pluggable per-kind solver() registry seeded for token/glyphic/generic-render kinds), flatValueSlots(), partSlots(), tokens(), selection(), decoratorsOf().
descriptions.core/generative-core.html: @dsCard demo page 'Generative Core' — loads the compiled DS bundle and live-renders ContainmentTree at 3 LOD levels plus DiagramSolver hub/pipeline/quadrant diagrams and a clickable network→hub morph demo, to showcase the two solvers computing from one spec.
descriptions.core/graph-layout.js: window.CV_GRAPH_LAYOUT — exports solve(graph,{w,h,R}) computing node {x,y} positions for hub/morph/network/pipeline/timeline/quadrant/tree/stack/column (relational board layout with hub+orbit+col fields) diagram types, and route(p1,p2,obstacles,opts) which finds a collision-avoiding cubic-bezier s-curve (bow search + escalating fallback corridor) between two points for edge routing; used by DiagramSolver and system/skin-system.html.
descriptions.core/layout-fit.js: window.CV_LAYOUT_FIT — injects CSS + exports stampMedia(el,url) (measures an image's true aspect ratio onto --asset-ar), solve(spec) (decides 'beside' vs 'stack' arrangement by comparing media aspect ratio to a BESIDE_AR threshold), and arrange(cardEl) which applies the computed arrangement class to a card element.
descriptions.core/morph.js: window.CV_MORPH — exports flip(root,mutate,opts) (FLIP-technique animated layout transition keyed by data-morph-id, with world-centered stagger), crossfadeSkin(root,oldSkin,apply) (clones+fades a DOM snapshot to dissolve a skin swap), and expand(el,opts) (toggles an element to fill its stage via flip(), coupled to CV_WORLD_CAMERA zoom).
descriptions.core/render-scene.js: window.CV_SCENE — exports attach(ground) (builds a live three.js WebGL scene projecting the DOM's solved block layout into lit/textured 3D slabs keyed off skin tokens, gated by --scene-mode:'gl', with signature-based rebuild-on-skin-change), sync(ground) (mode-aware re-attach/detach), and detach(ground) (disposes the scene, reverting to pure CSS).
descriptions.core/render3d.js: window.CV_RENDER3D — exports mount(el,opts) which lazy-loads three.js ESM and mounts a small scoped WebGL well (icosahedron/torus-knot mesh) with lighting/material computed from the element's resolved CSS tokens (--edge-dot, --zone-ground, --skin-map-* textures); also exposes .env (loadThree/resolveColor/luminance/tokenURL) shared with render-scene.js.
descriptions.core/slide-archetypes.html: @dsCard demo page 'Slide Archetypes' — loads the DS bundle and renders the Slide component across 3 LOD levels for one spec, a gallery of ~6 core archetypes, and a second gallery of the 12 capital-raise archetypes pulling default content from window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG.
descriptions.core/slide-fit.js: window.CV_SLIDE_FIT — version-guarded module exporting refit/fitOne/kick; scales each .cv-slide-stage to fit its .cv-slide-frame (letterboxing fixed-ratio slide/print content), driven by ResizeObserver + MutationObserver + a heartbeat interval that polls until a layout signature stabilizes (handles async <x-import> mounted slides).
descriptions.core/world-camera.js: window.CV_WORLD_CAMERA — exports observe(el)/measure(el) (derives --world-zoom = elementWidth/1440 per .skin-ground element, auto-coupling via ResizeObserver), to(el,{zoom,panX,panY},opts) (rAF-tweens camera zoom/pan and fires 'cv:cameramove'), and stampMaterials(ground) (writes --mat-tex-pos per .material element for texture decorrelation).
descriptions.core/ContainmentTree.d.ts: typed interface for ContainmentTree.jsx — declares ContainmentTreeProps {node:CVNode, lod, surface, density, DiagramSolver} and the component's attached registerAtom(role,fn)/atomRoles() statics.
descriptions.core/DiagramSolver.d.ts: typed interface for DiagramSolver.jsx — declares DiagramSolverProps {graph:CVGraph, axis?:{lod,surface,density}} for the single DiagramSolver(props) function export.
descriptions.core/RenderType.d.ts: typed interface for RenderType.jsx — declares CVType (registry Type shape: id/layer/family/runtime/defaults/slots), RenderTypeProps (type|typeId+registry, data, extends CVAxis), the RenderType(props) function, typeToNode(type,data,axis) signature, and the CoreTypes const shape (archetypeSeeds/seeds/seedInto/get/resolve).
descriptions.core/Slide.d.ts: typed interface for Slide.jsx — declares ArchetypeName union (15 core archetype names, though the .jsx now defines ~25 more not listed here [header stale]), SlideProps (archetype, content, extends CVAxis), the Slide(props) function, and the Archetypes const shape (list/build/register).
descriptions.core/cv-nodes.d.ts: typed interface shared by both solvers — declares CVAxis (lod/surface/density), CVKind union, CVNode (kind/role/shape/ratio/tone/flow/split/mode/priority/detail/text/value/label/delta/chart/bullet/children/graph fields), CVGraphType union, CVGraphNode, CVGraphEdge (incl. glyphgraph line/direction/routing/lineColor facets), and CVGraph {type,nodes,edges,axes,center,state,active}.
descriptions.axes/axis-core.js: Defines makeAxis(spec) building an axis object (register/resolve/tryResolve/values/ids/groups/family/valuesIn/canonical/pairOn/pairCSS/rolesOf/byRole/themeInvariant/default/setDefault/zero/query/resolveCSS/candidates/subscribe) plus CV_AXES registry (make/register/resolve/tryResolve/has/list/all/css/candidates/validate); exposes window.CV_AXIS and window.CV_AXES.
descriptions.axes/glow/glow-axis.js: Registers 'glow' axis (none/soft/medium/strong) into CV_AXES; each non-zero value's payload is a literal drop-shadow() CSS filter string tinted via currentColor, default 'none'.
descriptions.axes/level/level-axis.js: Registers 'level' axis (containment ladder page/region/panel/card/well/overlay) with groups flow/above; each value's meta carries rank, material modifier, keyline/gap space-axis ids; default 'panel', zero 'page'.
descriptions.axes/color/color-axis.js: Registers 'color' axis: 6 self-describing families (brand/semantic/ink/communication/neutral/zoning) with role/pairsOn/voice/roles, ~18 base values plus 9 zoning wash values (each token pointing at CSS custom properties) and 3 alias values (amber/clay/blue -> canonical warning/error/info); default 'bronze'.
descriptions.axes/ground/ground-axis.js: Registers 'ground' axis (skin backdrop) with groups stone/glass/plain and 8 values (plaster, plaster-cool, linen, paper-fiber, graphite, ink-depth, ink-depth-deep, none) each pointing at a tex-* token; default/zero 'ink-depth'.
descriptions.axes/space/space-axis.js: Registers 'space' axis over the 8px spacing scale: builds 14 values (s0..s24) programmatically from a steps array, each pointing at an s-* token with meta.px and grouped inner/between/layout; default 's4'.
descriptions.axes/depth/depth-axis.js: Registers 'depth' axis (elevation ramp) with groups flat/raised/system: flat, d1-d6 (each meta.dy/blur/opacity, most with elev-* tokens; d6 has no token), plus 'normal' fallback; default 'normal', zero 'flat'.
descriptions.axes/ordinal/ordinal-axis.js: Registers 'ordinal' axis (4 fixed warm-metal ramp stops o1-o4, each a token + meta.L luminance) with a build-time monotonic-darkening assertion (throws if L doesn't strictly decrease); also exports window.CV_ORDINAL with stopFor(i,n)/tokenFor(i,n) mapping an index-of-n to a ramp stop via even division.
descriptions.axes/form/form-axis.js: Registers 'form' axis over outer-ring geometry: derives values (none, triangle..octagon, circle) from CV_SHAPES.geom keys filtered to what's present, each with meta.sides/shape and a resolve() returning null (rendering deferred to CV_SHAPES.markSVG); default 'circle', zero 'none'.
descriptions.axes/material/material-axis.js: Registers 'material' axis for block surfaces: groups translucent/opaque/zero, values none/skin/glass/velum/parchment/stone each with meta.attr matching a data-material value and (except none/skin) a *-fill token; default 'glass', zero 'none'.
descriptions.axes/motion/motion-axis.js: Registers 'motion' axis: groups static/ambient/attention/interactive/process, 8 values (none, breathe, float, pulse, glow, bob, tilt, spin) each mapped via css: to a mo-* class name realized in motion.css; default/zero 'none'.
descriptions.axes/motion/motion.css: CSS realization of the motion axis: defines the .mo-breathe/.mo-pulse/.mo-bob/.mo-tilt/.mo-spin/.mo-float/.mo-glow classes and their @keyframes, gated under prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference, plus a hover-pause rule for .mo-tilt.
descriptions.axes/size/size-axis.js: Registers 'size' axis over element/mark sizing: builds 6 values (xs,sm,md,lg,xl,hero) from a sizes array, each with a size-* token and meta.px, grouped inline/standard/feature; default 'md'.
descriptions.axes/texture/texture-axis.js: Registers 'texture' axis (surface pattern) with groups none/line/field and 8 values (none, hatch, lines, vert, cross, grid, dense, dots); values carry no token/css payload here (rendering deferred to CV_SHAPES.markSVG/texture.css); default 'none', zero 'none'.
descriptions.axes/symbol/symbol-axis.js: Registers 'symbol' axis dynamically from window.CV_ICONS: rebuild() iterates CV_ICONS.data, creates a group per icon-taxonomy domain and a value per icon id whose resolve() calls CV_ICONS.get(id) live; exposes symbol.rebuild() for the foundry to call after new icons are added; meta.intrinsicMeaning true, default 'person'.
descriptions.axes/shadow/shadow-axis.js: Registers 'shadow' axis (cast shadow under a mark, distinct from 'depth'): none/low/medium/high/deep, each with a literal drop-shadow() CSS string using rgba(90,70,40,...); default 'none', zero 'none'.
descriptions.axes/density/density-axis.js: Registers 'density' axis (compact/comfortable/spacious) each with css: matching a data-density attribute value and meta.scalar (0.8/1/1.25) documenting the multiplier applied by density.css; default/zero 'comfortable'.
descriptions.axes/fill/fill-axis.js: Registers 'fill' axis (ring inner-space treatment) with groups none/surface/colour and 4 values (none, paper, wash, tint) each carrying meta.ramp naming a gradient recipe realized in CV_GLYPHIC's FILL_RAMPS (not defined in this file); default 'paper', zero 'none'.
descriptions.axes/flow/flow-axis.js: Registers 'flow' axis (group overflow intent) with 3 values wrap/reel/fixed, each css: matching a data-flow attribute value consumed by the .flow utility in tokens/layout.css; default/zero 'wrap'.
descriptions.axes/skin/skin-axis.js: Registers 'skin' axis (registry of skins) with 4 values (glass, stone, parchment, carbon), each meta describing attr/theme/renderWorld/ground/material/world in prose — no token/css/resolve payload, purely descriptive metadata consumed by tokens/skins.css scopes; default/zero 'glass'.
descriptions.app/registry/SaveAsTypeModal.jsx: React modal component window.SaveAsTypeModal: reviews/edits a Vi-extracted Type draft (name/id/layer/family/variables) then calls window.CV_REGISTRY.register on Save.
descriptions.app/registry/actions.js: window.CV_ACTIONS: verb/action registry (register/invoke/inverse/applicable/paramOptions) resolving args via CV_VARS, checking conditions via CV_COND; seeds ~15 built-in actions plus meta 'define-*' actions that let the interface author kinds/fields/relations/rules/decorators/axes/triggers/actions/macros into other registries.
descriptions.app/registry/block-type.js: Registers the 'block' universal-component Type (container/zone) into CV_REGISTRY with ground/surface parts, containment-ladder level axis, ordered content+action sockets, and exposes window.CV_BLOCK = { chrome(spec), walk(spec,fn), levels(), orderedSockets() } — a solver computing block chrome (material/depth/keyline/arrange) from axis values.
descriptions.app/registry/components-type.js: Registers ~24 React UI components (button, badge, avatar, card, input, switch, tabs, segmented, stepper, modal, popover, select, tooltip, toast, sheet, list, menu, checkbox, radio, appshell, table, search, skeleton) as CV_REGISTRY Types with valueSlots/sockets/classification, each pointing at the shared React bundle namespace for rendering.
descriptions.app/registry/conditions.js: window.CV_COND: shared condition evaluator (test/testAll/failures/normalize) supporting structured {field,op,value}/all/any/not trees, a string DSL ('a != b', 'a requires b', and/or), and predicate functions, with a small op set (==, !=, >, >=, <, <=, in, !in, exists, !exists, truthy, falsy).
descriptions.app/registry/decorators.js: window.CV_DECORATORS: cross-cutting @decorator vocabulary registry (register/query/decoratorsOf/applicable/find/decorate/run/parseAnnotations) seeded with ~18 retrospective decorators (kind, layer, classification, tags, provenance, axis, token, zero, socket flags, condition, generatable, editable, @dsCard/@template annotations) each deriving its value from an existing node field rather than storing a copy.
descriptions.app/registry/events.js: window.CV_EVENTS: trigger/event-bus registry (register/emit/on/subscribe) mapping an 'on' event + optional CV_COND 'when' to a CV_ACTIONS 'do' invocation with CV_VARS-resolved args; seeds 3 built-in triggers wiring ai.focus/ai.blur/selection.change to the 'highlight' action.
descriptions.app/registry/glyphic-type.js: Registers the 'glyphic' universal-component Type (ring+fill+symbol parts, size/motion/depth/value slots, ring/symbol sockets, dataSlots) into CV_REGISTRY, reading its value vocabularies live from CV_AXES/CV_GLYPHIC rather than duplicating them; exposes R.glyphic = { type(), valuesFor(facet) }.
descriptions.app/registry/inspector.js: window.CV_INSPECTOR: the one generic node-editing UI (mount(el,opts)/describe(target,opts)) that renders CV_PROJECT.toInspector output — value-slot tiles (previewed by re-rendering the node via CV_NODE), socket drop-candidates, decorator badges, and action buttons — routing all edits through CV_ACTIONS.invoke.
descriptions.app/registry/kinds-type.js: Registers 4 further universal-component kinds into CV_REGISTRY: panel.composition-menu (an insertable-item palette panel), kind.graph (thin wrapper Type pointing at the DiagramSolver engine), kind.slide-system (wrapper Type pointing at the Slide/deck-slide engine), and kind.selection (a selection-as-node Type with a members socket).
descriptions.app/registry/project.js: window.CV_PROJECT: the shared node→projection layer — toInspector(node) builds a UI descriptor (slots/wholeSlots/partGroups/sockets/actions/decorators), toToolSchema(node) builds an AI function-calling schema from the same CV_ACTIONS data, toContext(state) builds the shared context blob, coherent() checks UI/AI action-set parity, and toCollection(view) generates list/palette rows from a CV_QUERY-backed view spec.
descriptions.app/registry/query.js: window.CV_QUERY: generic cross-registry query facade (from/find/where over named sources ai/types/actions/decorators/axes/events) plus relations()/relation(), the generalized 'derive-by-query' pattern replacing hardcoded kind→capability maps with a live field-based lookup.
descriptions.app/registry/relationships-seed.js: Seeds 'relationship.<kind>' Types into CV_REGISTRY for every glyphgraph edge kind (reconciled from CV_EDGES.ids() union CV_MEANING edge.* fields), each carrying mirrored means/symbol/directed/inverse metadata and source/target sockets accepting glyphic/atom/block node classes; exposes window.CV_RELATIONSHIPS_SEED.ids.
descriptions.app/registry/text-type.js: Registers the 'text' typed-text primitive Type (role + color valueSlots, roles: micro/label/title/desc/body/src) into CV_REGISTRY and registers a CV_NODE solver mapping role→'.t-<role>' class + optional ink color; exposes R.text = { type(), roles, ensureSolver() }.
descriptions.app/registry/types-adapter.js: Bridges CV_REGISTRY Types to legacy global arrays (WIDGET_KINDS, WIDGET_SYSTEMS, WIZARD_KINDS, STEP_KINDS, WS_BLOCKS) by rebuilding them from registry queries on every change/boot-tick, and exposes window.CV_TYPES_SAVE (promote widget/wizard/step/block instances to Types) plus window.CV_TYPES_PROMPT (open/subscribe for the Save-as-Type modal).
descriptions.app/registry/types-core.js: window.CV_REGISTRY: the core universal Type Registry (register/registerMany/update/remove/revert/get/all/query/resolve/lineage/children/descendants/accepts/candidatesForSlot/socketInfo/subscribe) with built-in/user/template Maps, localStorage persistence for user+template types, single-inheritance resolution via `extends`, and slot/socket acceptance checks by axis-value or classification.
descriptions.app/registry/types-hooks.js: React hooks over CV_REGISTRY — useTypes(filter), useType(id), useResolvedType(id), useLineage(id), useChildren(id), useRegistryActions() — each re-rendering on R.subscribe registry-change notifications; exposed as window.use*.
descriptions.app/registry/types-seed.js: Seeds CV_REGISTRY's built-in catalogue across every layer: color/type/shape tokens, icon/status/shape/stamp atoms, WS_BLOCKS-mirrored block Types, widget systems (kpi/media/hybrid), widget/wizard-step/deck-slide surfaces, doc Types (deck/brochure/widget/wizard) and wizard kinds, pulling deck-slide archetypes from window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG (throws if missing) and hydrating block defaults from window.WS_BLOCKS once loaded.
descriptions.app/registry/types-thumb.jsx: window.TypeThumb (+ ScaledThumb, RenderShape, ThumbPlaceholder): universal thumbnail renderer dispatching by layer/family/runtime to ~20 per-kind thumb components (tokens, atoms, blocks, systems, surfaces, docs, templates), rendering blocks/systems/slides through the shared core render engine (window.__cvRenderType) when ready, else via WidgetRender/WS_BLOCKS or hand-drawn mock chrome.
descriptions.app/registry/types-ui.jsx: Shared Type-Registry UI primitives (TypeLayerBadge, TypeProvBadge, TypeChip, TypeCard, TypeLineageStrip, SlotAcceptsHint, TypeSlotList, TypeFilterBar, TypeTree/TypeTreeNode) exposed on window — badges, cards, filter bar and a layer-grouped inheritance tree for browsing CV_REGISTRY Types.
descriptions.app/registry/types-vi.js: window.CV_TYPES_VI: AI-assisted Type authoring helpers — proposeType() (brief+parent → draft Type JSON via CV_AI 'type.propose'), promoteInstance() (instance → reusable Type + extracted variables via 'type.materialize'), suggestSlots() (existing Type → suggested new slots via 'type.suggest-slots'), each parsing loose JSON from the AI reply.
descriptions.app/registry/vars.js: window.CV_VARS: the single variable-resolution mechanism — resolve(spec,ctx)/resolveAll/isDynamic/getPath — handling literals, '{{ path }}' interpolation strings (with '| default' fallback), {var}, {ref} (registry lookup), {query} (CV_QUERY derive-by-query), and {op} (join/eq/not/coalesce/concat/length) computed specs.
descriptions.app/registry/views.js: Seeds 7 built-in 'view' kind Types into CV_REGISTRY (view.library, view.palette-form/-symbol/-color, view.actions, view.decorators, view.views) each declaring a CV_QUERY spec + optional onPick action, consumed by CV_PROJECT.toCollection to generate palettes/libraries/menus from live registry data.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-block.js: Registers CV_AI capability block.compose: prompts an LLM to emit a nested container-block JSON tree (level/material/tint/arrange/sockets) from a brief, validated against CV_AXES + CV_BLOCK ladder/socket rules via validate(); parse() extracts and checks JSON, no hand-styling.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-capabilities-canvas.js: Bulk-registers ~26 per-canvas CV_AI text capabilities (color/icon/voice/pattern/component/build/deck/widget/wizard/type/inbox/chat) plus 2 image capabilities sharing generic runText/runImgGen/runImgEdit runners, plus one bespoke deck.titlechain capability that writes deck slide titles as one continuing sentence.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-glyphic-language.js: Registers CV_AI capabilities wrapping CV_MEANING's authoring/read API (glyphic.author, -author-relation, -author-gloss, glyphic.read, glyphic.describe) plus glyphic.assist (turns a natural instruction into typed, registry-validated graph ops via Company role glyph_assist, atomic loud-fail) and a context.glyphic resolver projecting the active meaning profile.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-glyphic.js: Registers two CV_AI capabilities: glyphic.generate (proposes N candidate 24px SVG icon symbol records from a brief, via Company role glyph_symbol_candidates or fallback prompt/complete path, validated by CV_GLYPHIC.validateSymbol) and glyphic.save (commits a chosen candidate into CV_ICONS.add with provenance 'vi').
descriptions.app/ai/ai-imagery.js: Registers CV_AI capability imagery.render: builds an image-generation prompt from a skeleton + per-skin (stone/glass) palette fragments resolved from the live skin axis tokens, then calls the openai-image provider's generateImage() for a transparent-background product render.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-layout.js: Registers CV_AI capability layout.compose: prompts an LLM for a relational graph-wall spec (nodes with hub/orbit/col/fx,fy placement + threads) from a brief, validated by validate() against CV_BLOCK levels/glyph ids/text roles/chart kinds; exports the grammar as window.CV_LAYOUT_GRAMMAR.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-registry.js: Defines window.CV_AI, the Universal AI Registry: a CV_REGISTRY-mirrored store of provider/behaviour/skill/capability/context entries with register/query/resolve/lineage, provider resolution (resolveProvider, incl. CV_HOST delegation), role-indirection (providerForRole/setRoleProvider), context resolution, behaviour composition, and execute() implementing ai-output = f(capability, context, params).
descriptions.app/ai/ai-seed.js: Seeds CV_AI built-ins that don't need composer helpers: providers (claude, openai-image, company, local-swarm, vision), behaviours (voice.conceptv, copy.budgets, angle, diversity), 7 transform skills + skill.theme, context resolvers (generic/pages/widget/wizard), and image.generate/image.edit capabilities.
descriptions.app/ai/ai-studio.js: Registers Studio-specific CV_AI entries: voice.openai and provider.local providers (both CV_HOST-delegated), context.studio resolver projecting CV_PROJECT.toContext(state), and studio.command capability turning a natural-language instruction into one action call via CV_PROJECT.toToolSchema.
descriptions.app/ai/host-runtime.js: Defines window.CV_HOST, the Environment/Host registry: pluggable runtimes (review sandbox floor, fsapi browser File System Access, native/MCP host) ranked by capability, a uniform read/list/write op surface with loud failure, a change-staging store (changes.propose/apply/reject), commit() (stage-then-write-or-handoff), serializer registration/dispatch (registerSerializer/serialize), and describe() self-documentation; bridges CV_AI.resolveProvider via resolveProviderRuntime.
descriptions.app/ai/host-serializer.js: Registers CV_HOST serializers (ai.entry, type, css.token, card, file — each rendering a change payload to exact source text via a js() JS-literal formatter) and CV_AI repo capabilities (host-fs provider, native-model/mcp-tools providers, repo.read, repo.list, ds.propose, ds.apply) so Vi can author real diffs into the repo.
descriptions.components/AppShell.jsx: AppShell.jsx — exports AppShell (default); props nav[]/activeId/onNavigate/header/title/className; renders desktop nav rail + mobile bottom tab bar over existing .cv-appshell/.cv-appbar/.cv-tabbar CSS, resolves nav icons via window.CvIcon
descriptions.components/Avatar.jsx: Avatar.jsx — exports Avatar (default); props src/alt/gold/size/className; renders with if src given else children/initials, size sets --avatar-size CSS var
descriptions.components/Badge.jsx: Badge.jsx — exports Badge (default); props tone(gold/success/warning/error/comm)/dot/as/className; renders configurable tag with cv-badge + cv-badge--{tone}/--dot classes
descriptions.components/Button.jsx: Button.jsx — exports Button (default); props variant(primary/ink/outline/ghost/soft/comm/default)/size(sm/lg)/pill/block/icon/as/href; renders <button> or <a> (if href) with cv-btn class composition
descriptions.components/Card.jsx: Card.jsx — exports Card (default); props variant(soft/surface/outline/gold)/raised/interactive/pad(sm/lg)/title/sub/footer/as; renders cv-card with optional header (title+sub) and footer, sets data-material=skin
descriptions.components/Checkbox.jsx: Checkbox.jsx — exports Checkbox (default); props label/hint/error/id/indeterminate; renders native <input type=checkbox> styled .cv-checkbox, sets DOM indeterminate via ref/effect, wraps in .cv-field/.cv-check-row when label/hint/error present
descriptions.components/Glyphic.jsx: Glyphic.jsx — exports Glyphic (default); props form/symbol/fill/ringColor/symbolColor/texture/motion/depth/size/value/className/style; delegates to window.CV_GLYPHIC.compose for SVG+motionClass, renders dashed-border placeholder span if CV_GLYPHIC unset
descriptions.components/Input.jsx: Input.jsx — exports Input (default); props as(input/textarea/select)/label/hint/error/id/className; renders cv-input|cv-textarea|cv-select control, wraps in .cv-field with label/hint/error when provided
descriptions.components/List.jsx: List.jsx — exports ListRow and List (default); ListRow props leading/primary/secondary/trailing/selected/onSelect renders cv-list-row (interactive+role=option if onSelect); List props rows[]/divided/children renders cv-list wrapping ListRow entries
descriptions.components/Menu.jsx: Menu.jsx — exports Menu (default); props trigger/items[]/placement/className/onOpenChange; clones trigger element to wire open toggle, renders items list via shared window.CV_POPOVER.Component, arrow-key/Enter/Escape keyboard nav, role=menu/menuitem
descriptions.components/Modal.jsx: Modal.jsx — exports Modal (default); props open/onClose/title/footer/className; renders cv-modal-overlay+cv-modal dialog (role=dialog, data-material=skin), closes on Escape/backdrop-click/close-button, returns null when closed
descriptions.components/Popover.jsx: Popover.jsx — exports Popover (default) plus internal placePopover(anchor,float,opts) positioning fn; props open/anchorRef/placement/gap/matchWidth/bare/role/onRequestClose; fixed-position floating layer with flip/shift logic, repositions on scroll/resize, closes on outside-click/Escape; publishes window.CV_POPOVER.place/.Component globals
descriptions.components/Radio.jsx: Radio.jsx — exports Radio (default); props label/hint/error/id/className; renders native <input type=radio> styled .cv-radio, wraps in .cv-field/.cv-check-row when label/hint/error present
descriptions.components/Search.jsx: Search.jsx — exports Search (default); props value/onChange/placeholder/icon/trailing/className; renders cv-search pill with leading icon (via window.CvIcon) + <input type=search>, onChange passes string value
descriptions.components/Segmented.jsx: Segmented.jsx — exports Segmented (default); props options[]/value/onChange/className; renders role=tablist cv-segmented with cv-segmented__opt buttons, active determined by value or first option
descriptions.components/Select.jsx: Select.jsx — exports Select (default); props options[]/value/onChange/placeholder/disabled/className; trigger button (cv-select__btn) opens listbox via shared window.CV_POPOVER.Component with matchWidth, role=listbox/option
descriptions.components/Sheet.jsx: Sheet.jsx — exports Sheet (default); props open/onClose/side(right/bottom)/title/footer/className; slide-in panel reusing Modal's .cv-modal__head/__foot chrome, stays mounted through exit transition (260ms, 0 if reduced-motion), drag handle when side=bottom
descriptions.components/Skeleton.jsx: Skeleton.jsx — exports Skeleton (default); props variant(text/line/circle/block)/width/height/className/style; renders aria-hidden <span> with .skeleton shimmer class, width/height applied as inline style
descriptions.components/Stepper.jsx: Stepper.jsx — exports Stepper (default); props steps[]/active/className; renders cv-stepper-line with cv-step entries marked is-done (checkmark)/is-active per index vs active
descriptions.components/Switch.jsx: Switch.jsx — exports Switch (default); props checked/onChange/className; renders role=switch <button> with cv-switch class, aria-checked reflects checked, onChange called with toggled boolean
descriptions.components/Table.jsx: Table.jsx — exports Table (default); props columns[]/rows[]/striped/className/children; renders cv-table <table>, columns support num(right-align)/feature(highlight) modifiers, children override for manual thead/tbody
descriptions.components/Tabs.jsx: Tabs.jsx — exports Tabs (default); props items[]/value/onChange/className; renders role=tablist cv-tabs with cv-tab buttons, active tab by value match or first item
descriptions.components/Toast.jsx: Toast.jsx — exports ToastHost (default) plus module-level show/dismiss/subscribe queue; publishes window.CV_TOAST global {show,dismiss,subscribe}; ToastHost props position/className renders queued toasts with tone-based styling, auto-dismiss timers, enter/exit motion classes gated by reduced-motion
descriptions.components/Tooltip.jsx: Tooltip.jsx — exports Tooltip (default); props label/placement/delay/className/children; wraps child as anchor with hover/focus handlers (120ms show delay), renders bubble via shared window.CV_POPOVER.Component with bare=true
