descriptions.components/Avatar.d.ts: typed interface for Avatar — declares props: src, alt, gold, size (number|string), extends HTMLAttributes<span>
descriptions.components/Badge.d.ts: typed interface for Badge — declares props: tone (gold/success/warning/error/comm), dot, as, extends HTMLAttributes<span>
descriptions.components/Button.d.ts: typed interface for Button — declares props: variant (primary/ink/outline/ghost/soft/comm/default), size (sm/lg), pill, block, icon, as, href, extends ButtonHTMLAttributes
descriptions.components/Card.d.ts: typed interface for Card — declares props: variant (soft/surface/outline/gold), raised, interactive, pad (sm/lg), title, sub, footer, as, extends HTMLAttributes<div>
descriptions.components/Checkbox.d.ts: typed interface for Checkbox — declares props: label, hint, error, indeterminate, extends InputHTMLAttributes<input>
descriptions.components/Glyphic.d.ts: typed interface for Glyphic — declares props: form (none/triangle/square/pentagon/hex/septagon/octagon/diamond/circle), symbol, fill, ringColor, symbolColor, texture, motion, depth, size, value, extends HTMLAttributes<span>
descriptions.components/Input.d.ts: typed interface for Input — declares props: as (input/textarea/select), label, hint, error, extends InputHTMLAttributes<input>
descriptions.components/List.d.ts: typed interface for ListRow/List — ListRow: leading, primary, secondary, trailing, selected, onSelect; List: rows[] (ListRowProps+key), divided; both extend HTMLAttributes<div>
descriptions.components/Menu.d.ts: typed interface for Menu — declares props: trigger (ReactElement), items (MenuItem{icon,label,danger,disabled,value,onSelect}|MenuSeparator), placement (from Popover PlaceOpts), onOpenChange, className
descriptions.components/Modal.d.ts: typed interface for Modal — declares props: open, onClose, title, footer, extends HTMLAttributes<div>
descriptions.components/Popover.d.ts: typed interface for Popover — declares PlaceOpts{placement,gap,flip,shift} and PopoverProps: open, anchorRef (RefObject<HTMLElement>), placement, gap, matchWidth, bare, role, onRequestClose, children
descriptions.components/Radio.d.ts: typed interface for Radio — declares props: label, hint, error, extends InputHTMLAttributes<input>
descriptions.components/Search.d.ts: typed interface for Search — declares props: value, onChange(value,e), placeholder, icon (string|null), trailing, extends HTMLAttributes<div> minus onChange
descriptions.components/Segmented.d.ts: typed interface for Segmented — declares SegmentedOption{value,label} and props: options[], value, onChange(value,e), extends HTMLAttributes<div> minus onChange
descriptions.components/Select.d.ts: typed interface for Select — declares SelectOption{value,label,disabled} and props: options[], value, onChange(value,e), placeholder, disabled
descriptions.components/Sheet.d.ts: typed interface for Sheet — declares props: open, onClose, side (right/bottom), title, footer, extends HTMLAttributes<div>
descriptions.components/Skeleton.d.ts: typed interface for Skeleton — declares props: variant (text/line/circle/block), width, height, extends HTMLAttributes<span>
descriptions.components/Stepper.d.ts: typed interface for Stepper — declares StepItem{label} and props: steps[] (StepItem|string), active, extends HTMLAttributes<div>
descriptions.components/Switch.d.ts: typed interface for Switch — declares props: checked, onChange(next,e), extends ButtonHTMLAttributes minus onChange
descriptions.components/Table.d.ts: typed interface for Table — declares TableColumn{key,label,num,feature} and props: columns[], rows[] (Record+key), striped, extends TableHTMLAttributes<table>
descriptions.components/Tabs.d.ts: typed interface for Tabs — declares TabItem{id,label} and props: items[] (TabItem|string), value, onChange(id,e), extends HTMLAttributes<div> minus onChange
descriptions.components/Toast.d.ts: typed interface for Toast — declares ToastAction{label,onClick}, ToastOptions{tone,title,message,action,duration}, global Window.CV_TOAST{show,dismiss,subscribe}, and ToastHostProps: position, className
descriptions.components/Tooltip.d.ts: typed interface for Tooltip — declares props: label, placement (top/bottom/left/right + -start/-end variants), delay, children, extends HTMLAttributes<span> minus children
descriptions.components/component-library.html: static specimen page rendering raw cv-* CSS markup (no React/JS) for buttons, cards, fields, badges/pills/chips, table, dark-ground swatch, tabs/segmented/switch/avatar/tooltip, stepper/modal, select/tooltip/popover states
descriptions.components/controls-live.html: interactive live-mount demo page loading React 18 UMD + _ds_bundle.js, renders actual Select/Tooltip/Popover components from window.ConceptVDesignSystem_c8f43c namespace with working state (select value, hover tooltip, click-to-anchor popover)
descriptions.system/axis-system.html: Live projection of window.CV_AXES: renders every registered axis (colour, space, size, motion, texture, depth, fill, form, symbol) as grouped value previews with token names, demonstrating each axis's full value set and its token-driven grammar.
descriptions.system/block-system.html: Demonstrates the Block as the universal container type: grounds/material surfaces (glass/velum/parchment/stone), depth-coordinate levels, ordered content/action sockets holding typed occupants (text, glyphic, row, num), rendered live via CV_BLOCK.chrome() with dial controls (material, density, theme, ground texture) and the one CV_INSPECTOR editing a live block instance.
descriptions.system/colour-axis.html: Demonstrates the colour axis as a relational graph: families (voice vs structure, pairing rules), self-describing values (token, roles, theme-invariance, aliases) via CV_AXES.resolve('color'), and per-component-type colour subscriptions (glyphic vs surface) resolved live through candidates(slotRule).
descriptions.system/glyphgraph-generator.html: A 'write by meaning' tool: free-text sentences describing entities and relations (is/part-of/before/with/could) are parsed into a glyphgraph, rendered via the real DiagramSolver and read back into English via CV_MEANING.readGraph, with a meaning panel to adjust facets/relations and an AI-assist strip for graph edits and icon generation.
descriptions.system/glyphic-foundry.html: A conversational AI symbol-generation studio: describe a needed icon, Vi (via CV_AI.execute) proposes multiple live-rendered glyphic candidates in a chat thread, iterate by feedback, then Save adds the chosen symbol into the shared icon library (feeding the Symbol axis / icon explorer instantly).
descriptions.system/glyphic-parts.html: Demonstrates a glyphic as three independent, separately-styleable layered parts (ring, fill, symbol) — each with its own colour/texture/motion — composed by a layered SVG compositor and edited by the one inspector's per-part sections (whole, ring, fill, symbol groups).
descriptions.system/glyphic-system.html: The master living-spec document for the whole compositional model: defines the Glyphic as a stack of orthogonal token-driven facets (form/symbol/fill/colour/texture/motion/size/depth), walks through slots vs sockets, anatomy, the universal-component unification (one node type spanning glyphic/token/panel/slide), decorators registry, the action layer (click-or-talk), self-growth via the system's own verbs, and query-projected collection UIs — annotated inline with '· BUILT' status markers tracking implementation progress against the original brief.
descriptions.system/inspector.html: Demonstrates window.CV_INSPECTOR as one projection-driven editor working unmodified across three different kinds (a glyphic mark, a composition-menu panel with sockets, and a colour token leaf-node), each column reading CV_PROJECT.toInspector(node) and previewing every option by rendering it through CV_NODE.render — proving no per-kind editor code is needed.
descriptions.system/language.html: Demonstrates the Glyphic Language: marks compute and display their own English 'read-out' sentence from their facet values via the meaning registry (cv-meaning), including fill-mode-changes-meaning, a two-node relation whose edge line-style encodes mood, and a full glyphgraph (via DiagramSolver) whose paragraph is generated live from the same graph object driving the drawing.
descriptions.system/root-unity-mark.html: Presents the single brand mark (√ unit — a square/ring/centre-symbol radicand mirroring the Glyphic anatomy itself) in three placements (canvas/gold/dark) plus a wordmark lockup, all rendered from the one source function CV_ROOT_UNITY_MARK.svg().
descriptions.system/skin-system.html: Demonstrates the SKIN registry: one block/graph-layout composition (a hub-and-satellite node graph with luminous connector threads) re-skinning across registered materials (glass, stone/champagne-plaster+porcelain per reference boards, carbon) including a GL-lit 3D scene mode, selected/potential/stacked states, and an AI wall-generation entry point (cvComposeWall).
descriptions.system/studio.html: The 'Root Unity Studio' interactive editor app: a Make view (for end users) and a Build view (for system authors) as two audience-projections of the same node, with a stage that renders the live glyphic, a chat/voice composer routed through CV_ACTIONS/CV_AI, and dev panes showing the same node as AI tool-schema and shared context — demonstrating talk-and-click as one action layer.
descriptions.system/studio-ng.html: Same Studio app as studio.html (Make/Build modes, chat+click composer, tool-schema/context dev panes) but with its editing column now driven by the generic CV_INSPECTOR (projection-driven) instead of the bespoke inspector, kept side-by-side with studio.html to verify parity before the bespoke renderer is retired.
descriptions.system/studio.css: Shared stylesheet for the Studio app shell (studio.html/studio-ng.html): defines CSS custom-property aliases onto the design tokens and lays out the topbar/mode-toggle/rail/canvas/inspect-panel grid used by both Studio variants.
descriptions.system/system-atlas.html: An explorable, searchable directory-tree map of the whole repo: every real folder/file as a clickable tree row labelled with its inferred system role, with a detail pane showing live full contents (tokens, axis values, types, components) for whatever is selected.
descriptions.system/system-map.html: An interactive treemap/network visualizer of the entire codebase (from system-map.json): nested folders/files as squarified boxes sized and coloured by role/metric, with resolution/loads/contains edge overlays, radial/tunnel layout modes, zoom/pan, an edit mode (create/rename/move/archive/delete queued as ops), and undo/redo — a live, editable map of how the system's files wire together.
descriptions.system/the-whole-thing.html: A narrative synthesis document ('the vision walked in its own laws') walking through the frame law, the one language, convergent 'rooms', the fusion map, the instrument-as-genesis, the interface thesis and remaining gaps — written as one chained argument citing live glyphgraph renders, law-matrix tables, and citizenship/coverage stat bars; authored by the design/language agent after a full lineage review, attributed to Tim Geldard.
descriptions.system/type-system.html: Live projection of window.CV_REGISTRY: every universal component type (Glyphic, the 11 UI components, panels/graph/slide kinds, block/surface/doc library) shown with its parts, value-slots (axis subscriptions) and sockets (typed attachment points), plus the single-inheritance 'extends' lineage trees — demonstrating one grammar covering the whole component surface.
descriptions.system/build-system-map.js: The canonical generator for system-map.json: scans the repo filesystem (given ls/readFile), classifies every file's 'role' by path/extension convention, extracts defines/uses (window.CV_* globals) to build contains/loads/resolves edges, and emits the versioned {nodes,edges,globals,roleCounts,scanned,generatedAt,version} model that system-map.html renders — never hand-edited.
descriptions.system/gl-inspector.js: A dev-only overlay panel for the skin-system's WebGL scene mode: exposes Camera/Lighting/Material/Relief dial groups that read/write --gl-* CSS custom properties directly on the stage element (a live projection of the token registry, holding no state of its own), visible only while the scene is in GL mode.
descriptions.system/system-map.json: Generated data feeding system-map.html: {nodes[] (1460 file/folder records with id/path/parent/type/ext/role/size/defines/uses), edges[] (2844 contains/loads/resolves records), globals[] (49 window.CV_* → defining-file records), roleCounts{}, encoding, scanned[] (353 source files), generatedAt, version:2}.
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-edges.js: window.CV_EDGES: registry of 4 edge kinds (face/documents/higher-order/navigates) with line/direction/ink facets; resolve(spec) fills defaults or throws on unknown kind (no silent default relation).
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-glyphics.js: window.CV_GLYPHIC: composes a 'glyphic' (form+symbol+fill+color+texture+motion+size+depth+outline) into SVG via CV_SHAPES.markSVG; exposes facets/defaults/schema, normalize/validate/compose/render/describe, plus composeRelation(rel) for node-edge-node relational glyphics using CV_EDGES+CV_SHAPES.edgeSVG.
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-icons.js: window.CV_ICONS (608 lines): CV_ICONS.data = ~144 kebab-case SVG icon bodies (24x24, stroke 1.5, currentColor) plus .taxonomy/.facets (domain/kind/tags), .search(q)/.get(name), and .add(rec)/._persist()/._loadPersisted() write-path for AI/manual authoring via localStorage.
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-meaning.js: window.CV_MEANING (1405 lines): contextual meaning-profile registry over facets form/color/fill/texture/depth/motion (+edge/line/operator fields); register/resolve/use/list profiles, valuesFor/meaningOf/tokenForValue/field lookups, describe()/describeRelation() sentence read-outs, and an author.* API (setField/setRelation/setOperator/setGloss/save/load) for live-editable meaning as data.
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-organisms.js: window.DNA.org (910 lines, ported from counterpart/design surface/runtime/organisms.js): ~28 deterministic (seeded-RNG) pure-SVG scene generators — icon, iconStrip, mesh, hubNetwork, cascade, consequencesBox, detailStrip, etc. — tokens-only colour, no framework coupling; claude-ds may alias window.CV_ORGANISMS = DNA.org.
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-shapes.js: window.CV_SHAPES: single home for shape geometry (circle..octagon regular n-gons) + shapeTypes (shape->semantic type e.g. hex=System) + brand entities; markSVG(spec,opts) renders a token-styled vessel+icon/wordmark; edgeSVG(facets,opts) draws the relational line/arrow in box or positioned mode.
descriptions.assets/icons/cv-vi-glyph.js: window.CV_VI_GLYPH: single hardcoded SVG path (viewBox 0 0 120 114, 5 subpaths) auto-traced from assets/brand-marks/vi.png — the canonical 'Vi' wordmark glyph, drawn by CV_SHAPES.markSVG's viWordmark().
descriptions.assets/icons/glyph-arc-seed.json: Data file ported from counterpart/design dna/sequence.json: narrative_roles (open/argue/show/prove/plan/people/close, each with does/archetype_affinity/evidence/dial_envelope), an 'arcs.pitch' run sequence, per-tier page-count/fusion strategies (tagline/one-pager/teaser/short/full), and a content_role_map (content-unit -> role).
descriptions.assets/icons/glyphgraph.js: window.CV_GLYPHGRAPH: grammar checker for a glyphgraph (nodes+typed edges IR); validateGlyphgraph(graph) checks edge structure, relation-type resolution via CV_REGISTRY, domain/range via accepts(), and edge conditions via CV_COND, throwing on any violation (collect-then-throw); checkGlyphgraph() is the non-throwing companion.
descriptions.assets/icons/icon-paths.js: window.CONCEPTV_ICONS + ConceptVIcon.jsx: a legacy/deprecated parallel icon library (viewBox 0 0 24 24, set-tagged core/ext-status/ext-ui/ext-media/ext-files/ext-arch/ext-time/ext-comms) explicitly marked DO NOT EXTEND — superseded by cv-icons.js/CvIcon.jsx.
descriptions.glyph-corpus.json: Root data file (31KB, GENERATED by _system/emit_glyph_corpus.js — do not hand-edit): {_generated, _counts:{symbols:144,fields:76,total:220}, entries:[{address,text}]} — glyph://symbol/<id> entries (name/domain/kind/tags) and glyph://field/<facet>/<value> entries (feeling/senses), the embedding corpus for glyph meaning.
descriptions.face-index.js: window.CV_FACES: GENERATED map keyed by Studio thing id; each face carries {address,title,faceof,excerpt,url,rel:{source,edge:{kind (from CV_EDGES)},target}} so the relational marker between a thing and its doc page is composed by CV_GLYPHIC.composeRelation, not hand-drawn (currently seeded with one entry, 'colors').
descriptions._system/emit_glyph_corpus.js: Node build script: loads cv-icons/cv-vi-glyph/cv-shapes/cv-edges/cv-meaning/cv-glyphics into a faked window global, then emits glyph-corpus.json from CV_ICONS.data (symbols) + CV_MEANING.valuesFor per facet (form/fill/color/texture/depth/motion/outline/line/lineColor/edge/direction); loud-fails on load error or empty corpus.
descriptions._system/substrate-graph.py: Python script: projects registry/address-registry.json + registry/symbol-registry.json into registry/graph.json in the exact shape counterpart's Graph instrument (DNA.mountGraph) expects — folder clusters, a ghosts cluster, symbol-level clusters ((icons)/(tokens)/(axes)/(actions)) with defines/wants edges, spine (top-18 by inbound refs), and type counts.
descriptions._system/gate.py: Python CI gate (detector #2): re-runs substrate-map.py, then diffs fresh registry/symbol-registry.json gap_counts/ghost_keys against the last git-committed HEAD version; fails (exit 1) on any ghost_*/dead_*/deaf_* count increase or new ghost key, passes (exit 0) otherwise or if no baseline committed yet.
descriptions._system/substrate-map.py: Python address-map emitter (two engines): walks the repo building addr{} of every file/dir with typed edges (loads/globals/tokens/assets/registry vocabularies, ghost/orphan detection, path-drift self-heal via suffix index, raw-colour and theme-frozen-alias detection), plus a symbol-registry engine parsing CV_* globals/tokens/icons/axes/actions/types/events/skins; writes registry/address-registry.json, registry/symbol-registry.json, and registry/GAPS.md.
descriptions.app/canvases/Components.jsx: Components(): gallery of built-in UI patterns (buttons/inputs/cards/chips/panels) w/ state previews + Vi-generated variants.
descriptions.app/canvases/Voice.jsx: Voice(): voice rules, brand vocab list, AI copy rewriter w/ rule-violation flags, tone-variant generator, per-rule system audit.
descriptions.app/canvases/Architecture.jsx: Architecture(): read-only doc canvas explaining the Type Registry — layer ladder, slots, lineage, consumers, entry points, embedding.
descriptions.app/canvases/Bridge.jsx: Bridge(): projects CV_HOST state — env capabilities, connectable runtimes, disk-write handoff mode, staged-change queue (apply/copy).
descriptions.app/canvases/Icons.jsx: Icons(): searchable/categorized icon grid w/ tone toggle; Vi generates, refines, duplicates, or deletes SVG icons.
descriptions.app/canvases/TypeBuilder.jsx: TypeBuilder(): author/edit a registry Type in split, wizard, or canvas layout; visual/form/Vi/JSON editing modes.
descriptions.app/canvases/Build.jsx: Build(): 4-stage Vi planner — brief, plan review, parallel subtask generation (icons/colors/copy/widget/wizard/deck), compose & adopt.
descriptions.app/canvases/Inbox.jsx: Inbox(): file drop zone; Vi auto-classifies uploads by category (image content or filename/type), user approves/rejects/bulk-applies.
descriptions.app/canvases/AIStudio.jsx: AIStudio(): OpenAI image tool w/ Generate/Edit/Compose/Mask/Chat modes, presets/pipelines rail, param bar, results rail.
descriptions.app/canvases/TypeBuilder2.jsx: No default export — window-assigns TypeBuilder.jsx's sub-components: library browser, live preview, field editors, slot-accepts modal.
descriptions.app/canvases/StubCanvases.jsx: StubCanvas({id}): generic placeholder screen listing planned features for not-yet-built canvases (Type, Logos, Imagery, etc.).
descriptions.app/canvases/Workshop.jsx: Workshop(): doc list + editor for decks/brochures/widgets/wizards — pages/sections CRUD, undo/redo, Vi candidate gallery, template save, export.
descriptions.app/canvases/Settings.jsx: Settings(): OpenAI key/org/proxy config, live image-model picker + defaults, world/skin switch, local storage usage + clear.
descriptions.app/canvases/Registry.jsx: Registry(): 'Workshop Studio Floor' — browse/add Types grouped by workstation (decks/brochures/widgets/wizards/shared), opens TypeInspector.
descriptions.app/canvases/Colors.jsx: Colors(): grouped palette swatch grid w/ inline hex editing, lock/snapshot compare, AI palette generation and per-swatch refine.
descriptions.app/canvases/Templates.jsx: Templates(): saved Build/Workshop runs as parameterised templates, grouped by parent registry Type; fill variables and re-run.
descriptions.app/canvases/Overview.jsx: Overview(): dashboard — stat tiles (colors/icons/components/inbox counts), canvas nav grid, recent-activity feed.
descriptions.app/canvases/RegistryInspector.jsx: Exports TypeInspector/SlotZones/VariableTags/ViChatScoped/ViStudioRail/QuickAdder — Registry's slide-in Type editor + persistent Vi chat rail + add modal.
descriptions.app/canvases/Imagery.jsx: Imagery(): 4-tab image subsystem — System library, per-Project imagery, 360° Hubs (pano + hotspot editor), AI Studio.
descriptions.app/canvases/Patterns.jsx: Patterns(): 'Motion & space' tokens — spacing/radii/shadows/motion tabs w/ live editing, lock/snapshot, AI token generation.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/Layouts.jsx: No component — defines window.WS_LAYOUTS (30+ slide/brochure layout templates), WS_MOTIFS, WS_THEMES, and the WSMotifLayer background renderer.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/AIEngine.jsx: No canvas component — Workshop's diff/generation engine: applyDiff, per-target Vi generators, WSCandidateGallery UI, diff cards; shared by all builders.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/Library.jsx: Library(): Workshop's left-side searchable asset panel (Blocks/Layouts/Icons/Components/Imagery tabs), click- or drag-to-insert.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/Blocks.jsx: No canvas component — defines window.WS_BLOCKS, ~30 content-block renderers (hero, headline, stats, funnel, timeline, etc.) plus the inline-editable Edit component.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/Polish.jsx: Exports WSShortcutsOverlay/WSOnboarding/WSErrorBoundary — keyboard-shortcut help panel, first-run onboarding tour, React error boundary for Workshop.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/Section.jsx: Exports Section()/AddDivider() — wraps one block w/ toolbar (move/lock/refine/vary/remove); renders the '+ add block' divider/drop target.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/WidgetBuilder.jsx: Exports WidgetBuilder()/WidgetRender() — dashboard/hub/embed widget editor: kind/system pickers, data panel, context-frame preview, variations, export.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/WizardBuilder.jsx: Exports WizardBuilder()/WizardRender() — multi-step flow editor (property/onboarding/generic): step list/editor, mock vs interactive-prototype preview, export.
descriptions.app/canvases/workshop/Export.jsx: No canvas component — exports window.WSExport/WSExportMenu: standalone HTML, print-to-PDF, and PPTX (via PptxGenJS) exporters w/ motif-aware styling.
descriptions.app/components/usePersisted.js: usePersisted.js — exports usePersisted(key,default) hook (localStorage-synced state) + cvStudioStorage.getAll()/clear() for namespaced 'cvstudio:' keys.
descriptions.app/components/Resizable.jsx: Resizable.jsx — exports Resizable({cols,storageKey}) component: draggable-gutter multi-column split layout, persists non-flex column widths to localStorage.
descriptions.app/components/CanvasHeader.jsx: CanvasHeader.jsx — exports CanvasHeader({title,sub,actions}), a small stateless header block (title/subtitle/action row) reused atop every canvas.
descriptions.app/components/ImageEditor.jsx: ImageEditor.jsx — exports ImageEditor({image,onSave,onClose}): full-screen modal canvas editor (adjust/crop-rotate/AI-edit tabs), bakes filters+crop+rotation to a data URL via canvas, AI tab calls window.CV_AI openai-image edit.
descriptions.app/components/ExportPatch.jsx: ExportPatch.jsx — exports ExportPatch({open,onClose,generatedIcons,extraColors,colorEdits,patternEdits}): modal that renders copy/download-able JS+CSS patch snippets for icons/colors/patterns pending manual application to source files.
descriptions.app/components/KitPreviews.jsx: KitPreviews.jsx — exports KitPreviews({tokens}): renders 3 static mini-thumbnails (Platform/Virtual Hub/Vi workspace) driven by CSS custom properties, for live token-edit preview in the Colors canvas.
descriptions.app/components/Pano360.jsx: Pano360.jsx — exports Pano360({src,hotspots,onAddHotspot,...}): lazy-loads three.js from CDN, renders an equirectangular sphere with drag-to-look, wheel-zoom, and clickable/editable hotspot pins.
descriptions.app/components/CommandPalette.jsx: CommandPalette.jsx — exports CommandPalette({open,onClose,nav,openExport,copyText}): Cmd+K fuzzy-search overlay indexing canvases, actions, icons, base colors, and voice rules.
descriptions.app/components/Sidebar.jsx: Sidebar.jsx — exports Sidebar({active,onSelect,counts,onOpenSearch,onCollapse}): left nav rendering NAV_SECTIONS (Workspace/System/Foundations/Build with/AI & settings) with per-item counts and a system-health footer.
descriptions.app/components/ViShape.jsx: ViShape.jsx — exports ViShape({size,animated,color}): the Vi diamond-mark SVG glyph (polygon + hatched pattern fill, optional animated opacity), reused as logo/chip/button icon everywhere.
descriptions.app/components/RefinePop.jsx: RefinePop.jsx — exports window.RefinePop({onRefine,disabled,placeholder,mode}): small popover (dot or pill trigger) with a textarea to submit a per-item AI refine instruction.
descriptions.app/components/ChatRail.jsx: ChatRail.jsx — exports ChatRail({scope,onAction}): persistent right-rail Vi chat; routes image-generation intent to CV_AI openai-image, workshop-doc edit intent to WS_AI diff proposals, else calls CV_AI.complete with a hardcoded ConceptV brand SYSTEM_CONTEXT prompt.
descriptions.app/components/MaskEditor.jsx: MaskEditor.jsx — exports MaskEditor({src,height,onChange}): canvas brush/eraser mask editor producing an alpha-channel PNG blob (transparent = edit area) per OpenAI images/edits mask spec.
descriptions.app/components/Toast.jsx: Toast.jsx — exports Toast() + global window.dsaToast(msg): single shared bottom-center toast notifier via a module-level listener array, auto-hides after 2.2s.
descriptions.app/registry.css: registry.css (2138 lines) — styles for the Universal Type Registry UI: layer badges/provenance pills, type chips/cards, slot lists, Registry canvas grid+rail, Type Builder (tb-* split panes/wizard/modal/preview-by-archetype), Architecture canvas (ladder, slot example, lineage, types-vs-templates, consumers table, entry points), and universal TypeThumb preview styles per layer (token/atom/block/system/surface incl. surface-widget context mockups and surface-step wizard frames).
descriptions.app/index.html: index.html — Studio's entry point: mounts #app via ReactDOM, loads React/ReactDOM/Babel-standalone from CDN, then in strict order the core engine (graph-layout/world-camera/morph/layout-fit + fetched-and-Babel-transpiled DiagramSolver/ContainmentTree/Slide/RenderType), the icon+Glyphic stack, all universal axes (color/space/size/motion/texture/depth/material/flow/level/density/skin/ground/fill/form/symbol), the Type Registry scripts, AI services+registry, CV_HOST runtime, shared components/*.jsx, all canvases/*.jsx, then App.jsx; also defines the data-skin='glass' world-camera MutationObserver and window.cvSetSkin.
descriptions.app/workshop.css: workshop.css (3555 lines) — styles for the Workshop document editor: doc-type picker, 3-pane ws-workspace (library rail/doc/outline rail), asset library tabs+search+drag tiles, section toolbar+variations carousel, 16:9 ws-slide-stage/frame with dark/gold bleed color flips, background motifs (paper/blueprint/edgeband/ink/goldBleed), and the full catalogue of slide block styles (hero, headline, quote, icons, stats, palette, button, callout, process, imagegrid, feature cards, funnel, cluster, pullquote, metric-row, bullets, iconstrip, labeledcard, comparison, hexbadges, chiprow, statpills, stattable, checklist and more).
descriptions.app/app.css: app.css — Studio shell layout: .dsa-shell 3-column grid (sidebar/main/chat), side-nav item states+pulse dot, canvas header/body, .dsa-btn variants, stat-grid/activity-feed/canvas-tile cards (Overview), inbox drop-zone+list, icon grid/generation panel, color-swatch grid, .dsa-chat rail (messages/composer/suggested pills), stub-canvas, and .dsa-toast (has a duplicate/orphaned second .dsa-toast rule block with stray declarations near file end, likely a leftover unmerged edit).
descriptions.app/imagery.css: imagery.css — styles for Imagery/AI Studio/Settings/Editor/360-viewer: cv-im-* tab bar, image grid+card overlay actions, empty states, Projects/Hubs two-col layout with pano-strip + hotspot rows, Pano360 pin/ring markers, then the larger 'AI STUDIO v3' cv-as-* system (resizable rail/stage, prompt/source/compose panels, param pills, run bar, results grid, chat sub-panel, modals), plus MaskEditor (cv-mask-*) and ImageEditor (cv-ed-*) modal-sheet styles (crop overlay, filter grid, slider, ratios, rotate row, AI-edit textarea+results).
descriptions.app/deck.css: deck.css — brand primitive classes extracted from the pitch deck for reuse: surfaces (cv-paper/panel/card/plate), hatch+blueprint background patterns, deck typography (title/section/eyebrow/body/stat), gold bullet/check lists, pill/tag badges, dashed-rule connectors, the V watermark mark, two-column cv-compare, cv-section-head/panel-head, entity cv-shape wrapper, layout utility classes (stack/row/spacer), and .cv-gutter (drag handle used by the Resizable component).
descriptions.app/App.jsx: App.jsx — root component: holds all persisted app state (inbox, generated icons/components, color/pattern edits+locks, templates, workshop docs, palette/pattern snapshots) via usePersisted, wires global window.cvNav and Cmd+K palette listeners, applies colorEdits/patternEdits to :root CSS vars, routes `active` to the matching canvas component, and renders the Sidebar/ChatRail/Toast/ExportPatch/CommandPalette/SaveAsTypeModal shell.
descriptions.atomicity/Home.jsx: React component AcHome (window.AcHome) — landing screen with 3 door buttons (foundations/explore/ingest) + Vi CTA + a static brand snapshot (palette swatches, type sample, mock property card); navigates via window.ATOMICITY.openNode/askVi.
descriptions.atomicity/Explore.jsx: AcExplore (window.AcExplore) — click-to-select hotspots on a mock property-card Canvas, calls CV_EXPLORE.variations() to generate N style recipes, like/dislike voting drives CV_EXPLORE.tasteProfile(), 'promote' commits chosen recipe as a new Type via CV_HOST/CV_REGISTRY; also renders a persisted gallery of promoted atoms.
descriptions.atomicity/explore-engine.js: window.CV_EXPLORE — builds an LLM prompt (via CV_AI.complete) requesting N distinct style-recipe JSON objects for a UI element, salvages/parses the JSON, exposes styleFor()/variations()/promote()/tasteProfile()/gallery (localStorage-persisted) and registers explore.variations/promote/run capabilities into CV_AI.
descriptions.atomicity/mode-engine.js: window.CV_MODE — a register/get/all/query/activate/subscribe registry for interaction 'modes' (click behavior + cursor + behaviours); ships two built-ins, 'operator' (normal click-nav) and 'inspect' (persistent CV_PICK loop feeding selections to Vi), reflects active mode via document.documentElement[data-mode] and pushes mode.behaviours into CV_AI.setActiveBehaviours.
descriptions.atomicity/scan-engine.js: window.CV_SCAN — pluggable source(resolve)×extractor(regex) scanner that periodically (setInterval, default 45s) rebuilds indexes over CSSOM/manifest-referenced files/curated app CSS/optionally a real repo tree (via CV_HOST); built-in extractors for var(--token) usage, @dsCard/@template tags, and TODO/FIXME comments; exposes usage()/todos()/tags()/stats()/describe().
descriptions.atomicity/index.html: Boot page for the standalone AtomiCity app — loads React/ReactDOM/Babel from unpkg + this project's icon lib, registries (CV_REGISTRY/CV_AI/CV_HOST), the _ds_bundle.js compiled components, then all atomicity/*.js and *.jsx (Babel in-browser) files in dependency order, aliases some icon names, calls ATLAS.init()+_wire(), CV_SCAN.start(), and mounts <AtomiCity/> into #atomicity; catches boot errors and renders them inline.
descriptions.atomicity/vi-brain.js: window.VI_BRAIN — assembles Vi's system prompt (architecture blurb + live ATLAS.census() + current node/picked-element context + learned preferences), calls CV_AI.complete for interpret(message,ctx,history) returning {say, actions[], proposals[], options[]} parsed from a fenced ```atomicity JSON block, stages 'propose' actions via CV_HOST.commit, provides suggestions()/quickCommands() and a learn(feedback) pipeline that distills feedback into a durable CV_AI behaviour entry (persisted in localStorage + staged via CV_HOST).
descriptions.atomicity/atomicity.css: Stylesheet for the whole AtomiCity app (top bar, tree rail, detail pane, hero band, Vi console panel/chat bubbles, command bar (⌘K), AcKit primitives (Specimen/StateDot/Tile/Sheet/HumanControl), Foundations workbench (fz2-*), Ingest layout (ig-*)); built entirely from CSS custom properties (var(--...)), no raw color/shadow literals per its own header claim.
descriptions.atomicity/ingest.js: window.CV_SOURCE — ingestion registry: addSource()/list()/update() over a localStorage-persisted corpus; registerRecognizer 'by-shape' heuristically types a source (stylesheet/brand-guide/voice-sample/deck/data/notes/palette-image) from filename/content; registerAnalyzer 'palette' (canvas pixel-bucket extraction for images), 'vision-read' (LLM vision, no-ops without a connected vision provider), and 'deep-read' (CV_AI.complete with DEEP_PROMPT to mine text for color/type/voice/structure/value/motif findings + optional CV_HOST proposals); bringForward()/bringAll() stage findings' proposals via CV_HOST.commit.
descriptions.atomicity/Atlas.jsx: AcTree/AcDetail/AcBody (window.AcTree, window.AcDetail) — renders the ATLAS projection model as a collapsible left tree + a right detail pane that switches render per node.kind (token/card/component/template/ai-entry/type/runtime/serializer/change/etc.), ends every detail view with a 'What Vi can do here' chip row from VI_BRAIN.suggestions(); also exports EnvCheck (window.EnvCheck), a live capability-status panel reading CV_HOST.describe()/CV_SCAN.describe().
descriptions.atomicity/Foundations.jsx: AcFoundations (window.AcFoundations) — a plain-language brand-editing workbench: hardcoded FACETS (Palette/Type/Roundness/Depth/Spacing) each listing curated tokens with human names/descriptions; selecting a tile opens an Inspector sheet with a HumanControl editor that live-edits the CSS custom property on document.documentElement (window.__acFoundationEdits) and can 'Save to brand' via CV_HOST.commit(kind:'css.token'); includes a static LivePreview mock property card fed by the same tokens.
descriptions.atomicity/Ingest.jsx: AcIngest (window.AcIngest) — upload/paste UI over CV_SOURCE: Dropzone reads files (FileReader, images as dataURL) or pasted text into new sources, SourceView triggers CV_SOURCE.analyze() and lists findings grouped by dimension with 'Bring forward'/'Bring all forward' buttons that stage CV_HOST proposals.
descriptions.atomicity/override.js: window.CV_OVERRIDE — a live-style-persistence layer: stamps a picked DOM element with data-cv-ov="N" and writes/rewrites a real CSSOM rule (with !important) in a dedicated <style id=cv-override-sheet> so inline-style edits survive React re-renders; apply()/clear()/clearAll()/get()/list(), plus snapshotStyles()/diff() for before/after comparisons used by Vi.
descriptions.atomicity/VoiceSurface.jsx: Defines AcVoice (window.AcVoice), a copywriting surface over fixed MOMENTS (button/headline/insight/empty/error) that calls CV_AI capability 'voice.write' (registered here) to generate 4 copy options per moment and 'Save to voice' stages a CV_HOST proposal (kind ai.entry); own header comment reads '// atomicity/Voice.jsx' [header stale — filename mismatch].
descriptions.atomicity/atlas-model.js: window.ATLAS — derives the entire navigable tree purely from live sources: fetches ../_ds_manifest.json plus reads window.CV_REGISTRY/CV_AI/CV_HOST/CV_SCAN, building tokenNodes()/cardNodes()/componentNodes()/templateNodes()/registryNodes() into one root TREE; exposes init()/rebuild()/find()/pathTo()/search()/census() and _wire() which resubscribes to CV_REGISTRY/CV_HOST changes to auto-rebuild (never resubscribes to CV_AI to avoid a navigate/rebuild loop, per inline comment).
descriptions.atomicity/picker.js: window.CV_PICK — document-wide element picker: on start(cb) tracks mousemove to spotlight (bounding-box overlay + role label) the element under the cursor via elementFromPoint, roleOf() heuristically classifies it (button/heading/card/image/badge/value/link/field/icon/navigation/element) by tag+class regex, click captures a describe() payload (role, tag, text, size, layout, box, computed styles, child roles) and hands {descriptor, el} to the callback; Escape/stop() tears down listeners; excludes AtomiCity's own chrome elements.
descriptions.atomicity/kit.jsx: window.AcKit — shared primitive components: Specimen (renders a token's visual truth — swatch/rounded box/spacing bars/shadowed card/font sample — by kind), StateDot (SVG idle/selected/active/edited morph), Tile, Sheet (closable bottom panel with Escape-to-close), Field (labelled wrapper), HumanControl (adaptive layperson editor: color picker swatch, range slider for radius/spacing, plain text fallback), and OptionRow (equal-width quick-reply button grid used for Vi's dynamic next-move options).
descriptions.atomicity/shot.js: window.CV_SHOT — screenshot capture/memory using lazy-loaded snapdom (@zumer/snapdom CDN, not html2canvas despite this file's own header comment naming html2canvas [header stale]); snapshot(el)/snapshotPage() capture PNG dataURLs, remember() keeps a FIFO-capped (default 8, adjustable 1-40) image history, aroundChange() captures before/after around a callback for visual diffing; registers CV_AI capabilities shot.setLimit and vision.diff (the latter throws without a connected vision provider).
descriptions.atomicity/AtomiCity.jsx: window.AtomiCity — the root component wiring AcTree+AcDetail+ViConsole+AcCommandBar together; owns selected-node/expanded/picked-element state, implements the act(a) verb dispatcher (open/expand/highlight/search/connect/ingest/explore/restyle/run) that Vi's returned actions execute against the real interface, exposes window.ATOMICITY = {act, openNode, askVi, startPick, setVi, setPicked, pickElement}, wires ⌘K (command bar) and ⌘E (toggle inspect mode) global shortcuts, and renders ModeSwitch (a CV_MODE projection) in the top bar.
descriptions.atomicity/ViConsole.jsx: window.ViConsole — the chat UI for Vi: floating FAB + slide-in panel with Chat/Teach/Memory modes; send() in chat mode calls VI_BRAIN.interpret() and auto-executes returned actions (opens nodes, or for 'restyle' captures before/after screenshots via CV_SHOT + applies via CV_OVERRIDE + gets CV_AI 'vision.diff' feedback), in teach mode calls VI_BRAIN.learn(); renders message bubbles with action-chip buttons, staged-proposal chips, before/after image pairs, follow-up text, and OptionRow quick replies; also shows a picked-element chip and a shot-memory limit stepper wired to CV_SHOT.setLimit.
descriptions.specimens/foundations.html: Canonical device-size frames, fluid type scale, 4 motion-easing hover demos, elevation ramp e0-e5, overflow-safe pill group.
descriptions.specimens/theme-modes.html: Same zone-token card+chip UI rendered in 4 side-by-side panes: light/dim/dark/contrast, showing gold stays the one saturated color.
descriptions.specimens/surface-zone-registry.html: Grid of 10 semantic zone swatches (base/content/panel/review/source/package/success/warning/reject/vi) with surface+strong+ink tokens and a gold-reserved-for-decisions rule note.
descriptions.specimens/liquid-glass-shell.html: Full dark-theme desktop app shell (top bar, chat pane w/ composer, file tree, canvas/preview cards) over an animated blurred light field, built on .glass + --s-*/--r-*/--layout-* tokens.
descriptions.specimens/operator-controls.html: Component set gallery: toast stack, slide-in sheets (bottom/right), list rows (default/compact/dark density), action menu, checkbox/radio, desktop-rail+mobile-tabbar app shell, plus table/search/skeleton trio.
descriptions.specimens/spacing-radius-elevation.html: Bar-chart of spacing tokens (--d-1..--d-12), swatch grids for radius (--r-xs..--r-2xl) and shadow/elevation ramp; contains a stray invalid CSS rule `'+v+': 0` in :root (looks like a leftover template-string bug, not a token).
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/kanban.html: Desktop kanban board: 4 columns (Backlog/In progress/Review/Done) of draggable glass cards with tag dots, badges, and avatars.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-player.ht: Mobile now-playing music screen inside phone frame: album-art slot, scrub bar with elapsed/remaining time, transport controls, up-next mini-card.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/settings.html: Desktop settings screen: left nav (Profile/Preferences/Notifications/Security/Billing/Help), profile fields, theme segmented switch, notification toggles.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-onboardin: Mobile 3-step onboarding screen: hero image slot, headline/subtext, numbered step list (1 done, 2 pending), progress dots, Continue button.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/media-gallery.ht: Desktop asset-library screen: sidebar (All media/Collections/Favorites/type filters), 4-col thumbnail grid with a selected tile, right inspector panel showing metadata+tags for the selection.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/index.html: Gallery hub embedding the other 11 glass-gallery screens (5 desktop + 6 mobile) as scaled live iframes, with a shared 4-mode theme switcher that recomputes every embedded frame.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-feed.html: Mobile social feed screen: category filter chips, scrollable post cards (avatar/text/media/like-comment-share bar), bottom tab bar.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-chat.html: Mobile AI-assistant chat screen: alternating ai/user message bubbles, an 'analyzing sources' status pill, composer bar with send button.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/inbox.html: Desktop 3-pane email client: folder/label sidebar, message list with unread dots, reading pane with body text and reply composer.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/dashboard.html: Desktop analytics dashboard: 4 KPI cards, weekly-active-users bar chart, channel-breakdown legend bars, top-pages data table with status badges.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-dashboard: Mobile home/analytics screen: greeting header, 2 KPI tiles, weekly bar chart, 4-icon quick-action grid, recent-activity list, bottom tab bar.
descriptions.specimens/glass-gallery/glass-app.css: Shared chrome CSS for the glass-gallery screens (icon buttons, avatars, search field, list rows, KPI cards, chips, mini bar-chart, toggle switch, ambient light field), all token-referencing; top of file has a 'loud-fail wave B' hoisted `--h: 40%` root fallback.
Mobile settings screen: profile row, Appearance group (theme segmented control, motion/density switches), Notifications group, Account group with chevron rows, tab bar.
descriptions.templates/capital-raise/support.js: Generated dc-runtime bundle (from dc-runtime/src/*.ts) — parses <x-dc> template docs, loads React/ReactDOM UMD, boots the DCLogic component runtime; identical to pitch-deck/support.js.
descriptions.templates/capital-raise/ds-base.js: Injects the design system into the template: sets data-skin=glass default, links 19 individual token CSS files + core/containers.css + styles.css, loads cv-shapes.js/cv-icons.js, the compiled _ds_bundle.js, and core/slide-fit.js.
A .dc template: 16-slide investor capital-raise deck defined as content-as-data (DECK array of archetype+content objects) rendered via <x-import> Slide components, with IntersectionObserver reveal animation and slide-fit sizing logic.
descriptions.templates/pitch-deck/support.js: Generated dc-runtime bundle, byte-identical to templates/capital-raise/support.js (same dc-runtime build).
descriptions.templates/pitch-deck/PitchDeck.dc.html: A .dc template: 10-slide investor pitch deck defined as content-as-data (DECK array of archetype+content objects) rendered via <x-import> Slide components, with IntersectionObserver reveal animation.
descriptions.templates/pitch-deck/ds-base.js: Injects the design system into the template: sets data-skin=glass default, links only the aggregated styles.css (which @imports all token files), loads cv-shapes.js/cv-icons.js, _ds_bundle.js, and slide-fit.js — functionally same as capital-raise's ds-base.js but via one CSS entrypoint instead of 19 separate links.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/ViStatusPill.jsx: Exports ViStatusPill — a small inline pill showing a ViMark icon + text (optional 'live' pulsing state), used to surface Vi's current activity.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/README.md: Describes the Vi UI kit: ConceptV's internal AI assistant workspace, a three-pane layout (chat / task tree / live output preview) mirroring its brochure-build architecture, with a component table and demo instructions.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/OutputPreview.jsx: Exports OutputPreview (and internal BrochureSection) — the right-pane live brochure mockup showing hero, brand colours, feature stats, description and price/agent fields transitioning between pending/gap/done states.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/TaskTree.jsx: Exports TaskTree (and internal TaskNode) — renders Vi's 3-layer agent pipeline as stacked layer groups of state-coloured task nodes with connectors between layers.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/ViMark.jsx: Exports ViMark — the diamond-shaped SVG brand avatar with a line-fill pattern, optional pulsing animation and optional 'Vi' glyph overlay, at configurable size.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/index.html: Demo page mounting the Vi Workspace kit: loads colors_and_type.css + vi.css, React/ReactDOM/Babel from unpkg, then the kit's .jsx components in dependency order ending with ViKitApp.jsx.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/ViKitApp.jsx: Exports ViKitApp — the full stateful demo root: side nav, and 3-pane workspace (ChatPanel/TaskTree/OutputPreview) driving a scripted 5-step brochure-build simulation with Continue/Reset controls; self-mounts to #app.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/vi.css: Styles for the Vi kit: the 240px-sidebar + workspace grid shell, nav items, layer/task-tree visuals, chat panel, brochure preview, and status pill.
descriptions.ui_kits/vi/ChatPanel.jsx: Exports ChatPanel plus Message, ReadCard, MissingPrompt, ApproveCard — the left conversation pane: message list with auto-scroll, entity-read cards, missing-field prompts, an approval card, and the message composer input.
descriptions.ui_kits/virtual-hub/README.md: Describes the Virtual Hub UI kit: the buyer-facing photo-first panotour viewer with a dark translucent overlay UI, its layout zones, component table, and demo instructions.
descriptions.ui_kits/virtual-hub/hub.css: Styles for the Virtual Hub viewer: full-bleed photo stage background/vignette, and dark overlay UI (bug, menu, panels, capture popup) over it.
descriptions.ui_kits/virtual-hub/SharePanel.jsx: Exports SharePanel (and internal ShIcon) — right-side panel showing a copyable hub share link plus Email/Copy link/Embed/Download PDF row actions.
descriptions.ui_kits/virtual-hub/HubApp.jsx: Exports HubApp — the viewer root: manages active hub, open menu, active side panel (info/share/floorplan), and click-to-drop capture-comment state; composes HubBug, MenuButton, QuickMenu, InfoPanel, SharePanel, FloorplanOverlay, CaptureComment; self-mounts to #app.
descriptions.ui_kits/virtual-hub/QuickMenu.jsx: Exports QuickMenu (and internal QmIcon) — the dark popup column with Info/Floorplan/Share/Gyro(disabled)/Close buttons that switches the active side panel.
descriptions.ui_kits/virtual-hub/index.html: Demo page mounting the Virtual Hub viewer kit: loads colors_and_type.css + hub.css, React/ReactDOM/Babel from unpkg, then the kit's .jsx components ending with HubApp.jsx.

descriptions._demo/run_pages.py: Launches the real page_face.serve page-face HTTP service on 0.0.0.0:8774 (render_page + no-script CSP) as a durable background process.
descriptions._demo/verify_address.js: Verifies core/cv-address.js: encode/decode round-trip (7/15 worked example), sibling spans partition [0,1) exactly, LCA/lcaAll anchoring rules, zones() reproduces the fixed title-main-footer pixel split, stable slotFor() indices never move on growth/doubling, and span()/zones() throw on invalid input.
descriptions._demo/verify_arc.js: Verifies core/cv-arc.js: CV_ARC.plan('pitch',16,SEED) reproduces the exact ported deck's beat-role run-lengths, immersive bookends, archetype-changes-at-role-boundaries, a bookend-vs-middle warmth-dial pattern, plan() determinism, and throws on an unreachable beat count.
descriptions._demo/verify_edgelaw.js: Verifies the Edge Law (R1/A2/G6.2): every edge meaning field declares directed + inverse (or directed:false for symmetric), relationship Types mirror {directed,inverse}, readGraph realizes both forward and inverse tellings from one stored edge (triples stay canonical), a live-authored verb-pair works with no code change, parse() round-trips the inverse telling, cv-edges has no verbs table, and resolve() throws with no kind or an unknown kind.
descriptions._demo/verify_entry.js: Verifies index.js (the packaging entry): getDS()/getRegistry() throw loudly (naming the missing global) when the bundle/registry globals aren't on window, resolve correctly once stubbed, reject unknown registry ids (listing known ones), and listRegistries() accurately reports loaded/unloaded state before and after stubbing.
descriptions._demo/verify_g0.js: Demo/dump script (no pass/fail assertions) exercising CV_MEANING as authorable data: prints seeded operator symbols, composeRelation output, live setField/setGloss/removeField/setOperator authoring, JSON save() round-trip, and confirms setField with no feeling throws.
descriptions._demo/verify_g10.js: Verifies G10 multi-target read-out: readGraph(...,{target:'english'|'triples'}) both project on the same 7 sample graphs (single/relation/branch/chain/negation/notOp/conditional), 'triples' output is structural with no English leak, english sentences match known baselines, absent/empty target defaults to english, and unknown targets ('klingon','code') plus unknown edge kinds throw loudly even in triples mode.
descriptions._demo/verify_g11.js: Verifies G11 stable-slot glyphgraph layout (real layout() sliced from core/DiagramSolver.jsx): appending a same-rank sibling leaves existing nodes' x/y byte-identical across 2→3→4→5 reveals, no pairwise overlap within capacity, pitch/stride is independent of the count-dependent render-size shrink, over-capacity slots honestly overflow the viewbox without re-packing, mid-array insertion (out of scope) does move later slots, and hub/network/quadrant/authored-xy layout types still behave as before.
descriptions._demo/verify_g2.js: Verifies G2 facets via the real engine: lineColor is a relation-state meaning field rendered by edgeSVG (explicit colour wins over ink default) and read out through composeRelation; compareSize(80,40/40,80/50,50/nulls) yields more/less/equal/null and threads into 'more than' relation sentences; ring vs symbol colour/motion resolve independently in compose+describe; and present-unknown lineColor/size/ring/symbol values throw while absent values contribute nothing.
descriptions._demo/verify_g2_4.js: Verifies G2.4 conditionals+negation in describeRelation/readGraph/composeRelation: negate:true and the 'not' kind both negate without doubling and preserve the relation word; dashed mood negates as 'could not be'; conditions strings (single and and-joined via CV_COND) render as 'if … then …'; negation+conditional combine correctly; and present-unknown line/kind/lineColor still throw on negated/conditional edges while absent negate/conditions read as plain positive.
descriptions._demo/verify_g3.js: Verifies G3 glyphgraph rulebook via CV_REGISTRY/CV_GLYPHGRAPH: relationship Types are seeded and fill kind.graph's edges socket (query+candidatesForSocket work); validateGlyphgraph passes a well-formed graph, rejects a node whose classification fails the source/target socket's accepts() check, throws naming an unknown relation-type, throws on structural defects (untyped edge, dangling endpoint, duplicate node id), evaluates per-edge CV_COND conditions (throwing on failure, passing when satisfied), and confirms no second edge/meaning registry exists.
descriptions._demo/verify_g8b.js: Verifies G8b data-bindings ({bind,map} facet values) via CV_MEANING/CV_GLYPHIC: isBinding/hasBindings correctly discriminate bindings from literals/per-part objects; resolveBindings is pure (never mutates source spec); the SAME bound glyphic spec renders/reads differently across pending/accepted/sold data contexts (colour token and sentence both change); resolveSet powers it for both discrete and scale (interpolated) encodings; missing source field, unmapped value with no fallback, and bound-spec-with-no-context all throw, while a fallback resolves and unbound specs pass through unchanged; and a bound relation (source+edge) also re-resolves per data context.
descriptions._demo/verify_g9.js: Verifies G9 parse() (text→glyphgraph) by round-tripping readGraph(parse(sentence)).sentence against the original sentence for single-node/relation/coordination examples and hand-typed sentences, confirms a live-authored gloss ('lock'→'safety door') parses immediately, and checks parse() throws naming an unknown content token plus throws with the honest 'STARTER GAP' cause for unimplemented subordination and conditional parsing.
descriptions._demo/verify_glyph.js: Verifies CV_GLYPHIC.describe/composeRelation on a single octagon+house+wash mark and its fill-value variants (none/paper/wash), confirms dashed vs solid 'face' relations read differently, checks unknown form/fill/symbol/texture and a line-less relation/unknown edge line all throw, and dumps the 'line' facet's known values including right-angled.
descriptions._demo/verify_language.js: Demo/dump script (no assertions) printing readGraph() sentences for 6 hand-built graphs (single node, relation, dashed 'potential' case, coordination branch, subordination chain) plus referent() output contrasting square/present vs circle/concept phrasing.
descriptions._demo/verify_r1b.js: Verifies R1b edge-law follow-through: cv-edges' EDGE_KINDS no longer carry 'means:' sentences and resolve() omits 'means' (CV_EDGES.means() is gone); glyphic.assist's buildVocab() and context.glyphic's resolveCtx() both surface full directed/inverse relation fields (not bare ids); glyphic.author/glyphic.author-relation declare kindWord/opWord/determiner/directed/inverse as authorable params; and describeRelation({focus:'target'}) realizes the correct inverse-subject telling, including under negation.
descriptions._demo/verify_readgraph.js: Demo/dump script (no pass/fail assertions) printing readGraph() sentences for single-node, relation, potential(dashed), coordination-branch and subordination-chain graphs after live-authoring symbol glosses, plus referent() output for the circle-vs-square kind/instance distinction.
descriptions._demo/verify_referent_data.js: Verifies R2: kindWord/opWord/determiner (e.g. octagon→'gateway', triangle→'action on', fill none→'the') are FIELD DATA on form/fill/outline, not private consts — referent()/parse() read them from the active profile; setField live-changes a kind word and a determiner so both referent() and parse() immediately reflect it and the old word is gone (loud on stale usage); confirms REFERENT_KIND/REFERENT_OP consts no longer exist in cv-meaning.js source; and referent() still throws on an unknown form.

descriptions.analysis/COMPANY-KNOWLEDGE-LAYER.md: Inventories two distinct company knowledge systems (agent-facing guides/door/verbs vs operator-facing address-help/pages/territory) and what an operator UI replacement must surface.
descriptions.analysis/DIAGRAMS.md: Defines a hierarchical diagram type system (10 diagram types/subtypes, node/edge/axis schema, icons as content) that the graph solver/generator implements.

descriptions._qa/cv-node-test.html: Proves CV_NODE's unification: all kinds (token/glyphic/Type/component/panel/slide) lens to one canonical shape, value- and thing-sockets share one accepts/candidates call, and resolve()/render() recurse and dispatch across radii (token, glyphic, wildcard).
descriptions._qa/mark-compare.html: Side-by-side visual diff harness: source brand-mark PNGs vs CV_SHAPES.markSVG-rendered SVG for userPortal/propertyWizard/virtualHubs/vi, to eyeball fidelity of the vector redraws.
descriptions._qa/decorators-test.html: Proves CV_DECORATORS: catalogues the @decorator vocabulary (>=18), shows derive() reads existing fields by reference (no copy), find() searches by decorator, condition/editable/requires-forbids behaviors, ctx-threaded cross-layer conditions, and tokens-as-nodes view.
descriptions._qa/core-test.html: Renders ContainmentTree at 3 LODs (summary/pitch/full) from one spec, plus DiagramSolver on hub/pipeline/quadrant graph types, loading the real .jsx via Babel — visual proof, no pass/fail assertions.
descriptions._qa/zone-probe.html: Minimal probe rendering divs colored by each --zone-*-surface CSS custom property (base/content/panel/review/source/package/success/warning/reject/vi) to check the token set resolves.
descriptions._qa/perpart-test.html: Proves CV_GLYPHIC.compose supports per-part styling (color/texture/motion independently on ring/fill/symbol) alongside legacy flat-spec and whole-glyph motion, rendered as a row of glyphs.
descriptions._qa/operator-controls-test.html: Loads real .jsx for Toast/Sheet/List/Menu/Checkbox/Radio/AppShell/Table/Search/Skeleton via fetch+Babel and runs behavioral assertions (queueing, dismiss, keyboard nav, aria attrs, click handlers) against live DOM.
descriptions._qa/frame-probe.html: Minimal probe rendering divs sized by --frame-deck-16x9/-3x2, --frame-a4-p, and --frame-mobile-p width/height tokens to check the frame-dimension token set resolves.
descriptions._qa/glyph-only.html: Static side-by-side SVG comparison of the same glyph path rendered with fill-rule evenodd vs nonzero — visual-only, no assertions.
descriptions._qa/studio-test.html: Proves the Studio substrate: CV_VARS variable resolution ({{}}, {var}, {op:coalesce}), CV_ACTIONS invoke mutating live nodes + loud failure on missing params, CV_PROJECT's inspector/tool-schema coherence (UI actions === AI tool names), and the chat/voice→action loop with generatable resolved via CV_AI query.
descriptions._qa/cr-test.html: Renders every newly added archetype (product-cover, dashboard, orbital, manifold, fidelity, etc.) from its registered defaults, plus 6 new diagram sub-types (orbital/stacked/spectrum/manifold/fidelity/hub) through DiagramSolver — visual proof, no assertions.
